# Natan Commercial Agency

> B2B intermediation agency connecting North American companies with the Colombian and Latin American markets through feasibility studies, commercial strategy and execution.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of Natan Commercial Agency's services and value proposition.
- [Services](/servicios): Feasibility studies, commercial strategy, sales planning and commercialization.
- [Projects](/proyectos): Featured projects and product distributions.
- [About](/quienes-somos): Leadership, values and methodology.
- [Contact](/contacto): Contact form and direct channels.
- [Blog](/blog): Articles on international trade, market expansion and Latin American business.

## English

- [Home (EN)](/en): English version of the homepage.
- [Services (EN)](/en/services): Services in English.
- [Projects (EN)](/en/projects): Projects in English.
- [About (EN)](/en/about): About in English.
- [Contact (EN)](/en/contact): Contact in English.
- [Blog (EN)](/en/blog): Blog in English.
